message:
fix(sqlite,snapshot,wheel,raptorq): synchronous rollback, OOM cap, wrapping IDs, clippy

- sqlite: replace fire-and-forget background ROLLBACK in transaction Drop
  with synchronous inline ROLLBACK to prevent race with subsequent BEGIN
- snapshot: cap Vec::with_capacity to remaining cursor bytes to prevent
  OOM from crafted payloads with inflated task/children counts
- wheel: use wrapping_add instead of saturating_add for timer next_id and
  next_generation to prevent duplicate handles at u64::MAX
- oneshot: update doc examples to reflect mut rx receiver API
- raptorq: replace .expect(&format!()) with .unwrap_or_else(|_| panic!())

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
